Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: New: /scrooge now opens the Gil Dashboard (config moved to the title-bar cog or /scrooge config). Dashboard money line shows total worth, today's earnings, and pending sales at a glance. Gil Goals: set per-retainer, walking-gil, and total-worth targets with progress bars and a chat celebration when you cross one. Desynth yield tracking: yields appear live in the run log with material values, and a new Desynth dashboard tab compares melt value vs market value per source item (with GC seal values). Stability: a full interop safety pass - market board, retainer, and gil reads now fail soft instead of risking crashes.
